title: Prepare value added compost-based products
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare value added compost-based products demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Organise for value-added product preparation

pcs.text: Identify product requirements from job specifications or work order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify product requirements from job specifications or work order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify product requirements from job specifications or work order.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select required equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with preparing products, and minimise impact

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with preparing products, and minimise impact.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and check compost and additives against specifications, and identify and report variations or non-conformances.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Blend and process compost, materials and other additives.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean machinery, equipment and site to avoid contamination between batches according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Conduct quality inspection and readiness for sale checks
